CustomField.description: Contracted price per Agentic Work Unit (AWU) on this Opportunity. Committed-Spend deals unlock a lower per-AWU rate against a contractual monthly minimum.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Precio contratado por Agentic Work Unit (AWU). Los contratos Committed-Spend habilitan una tarifa menor a cambio de un mínimo mensual comprometido.
CustomField.label: Per-AWU Rate
